title: trisetum lineare
intro: Trisetum lineare, a species of grass native to Asia and Europe, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Trisetum lineare can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat a range of ailments.
